2606.13535.title: AgentRivet: an automated system for producing Rivet routines from journal publications
2606.13535.paper_summary: Particle physics collider experiments provide Rivet routines as part of the analysis preservation strategy for model-independent measurements. Rivet is a C++ toolkit that allow new theoretical models to be compared to the measurements, thus aiding the development and tuning of Monte Carlo event generators as well as searches for physics beyond the Standard Model. However, analysis coverage is known to be incomplete, with only 39% of measurements having documented and publicly available Rivet routines. In this article, we design and implement an automated workflow based on Large Language Models with the goal of providing the missing routines. This multi-step workflow, referred to as AgentRivet, extracts the physics analysis information from published papers and writes the missing Rivet routines, with intermediate code- and physics- reviews as part of an autonomous quality control. We report the results obtained using commercial Large Language Models, provided by OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google, for two recent measurements from the ATLAS and CMS experiments. We find that AgentRivet produces competent Rivet routines with few syntax errors. The physics fidelity of the routines is reasonable and follows the explanations given in the relevant publications. Nevertheless, physics-implementation issues do arise and are investigated using the artefacts produced by AgentRivet. The majority of physics implementation issues arise from subtle-but-ambiguous definitions in the given publication, although some models struggle to implement complex observables even when clear definitions are given.
2606.13535.paper_summary_zh: 粒子物理對撞機實驗提供Rivet例程，作為模型獨立測量的分析保存策略的一部分。Rivet是一個C++工具包，允許將新的理論模型與測量結果進行比較，從而幫助蒙特卡羅事件生成器的開發和調整，以及尋找超越標準模型的物理現象。然而，分析覆蓋率被認為是不完整的，只有39%的測量擁有文檔化且公開可用的Rivet例程。在本文中，我們設計並實施了一個基於大型語言模型的自動化工作流程，目標是提供缺失的例程。這個多步驟的工作流程被稱為AgentRivet，從已發表的論文中提取物理分析信息，並編寫缺失的Rivet例程，並進行中間代碼和物理審查，作為自主質量控制的一部分。我們報告了使用商業大型語言模型的結果，這些模型由OpenAI、Anthropic和Google提供，針對ATLAS和CMS實驗的兩個近期測量。我們發現AgentRivet生成的Rivet例程具備良好的能力，且語法錯誤很少。這些例程的物理忠實度合理，並遵循相關出版物中給出的解釋。然而，物理實現問題確實存在，並利用AgentRivet產生的文物進行調查。大多數物理實現問題源於給定出版物中微妙但模糊的定義，儘管一些模型在給出明確定義的情況下仍然難以實現複雜的可觀測量。
2606.13535.author: Antonio J. Costa et.al.
2606.13535.authors: Antonio J. Costa, Caterina Doglioni, Christian Gütschow, Andrew D. Pilkington, Sukanya Sinha
